text:
## Supervisor guidance for critique

Reject candidates where re-invocation would be legitimately warranted (mutable state, race conditions, expired cache). Reject if redundancy overlaps with input_hallucination (fake args) or over_planning (excess deliberation w/o repeat call). Verify the prior tool result is actually present in the scripted context. Confirm at least 2 candidates per sub-dim and balanced tool coverage.

Run-level focus: Elicit redundant_tool_invocation behaviour where the age...
